name: uav-blackbox-chaincode
description: Hyperledger Fabric chaincode for trusted UAV flight log notarization.

scripts.build: node --check index.js && node --check lib/ledger.js && node --check lib/contracts/uavIdentityContract.js && node --check lib/contracts/missionLogContract.js && node --check lib/contracts/evidenceContract.js && node --check lib/contracts/accessControlContract.js && node --check lib/contracts/emergencyLinkageContract.js
